name: ATM Wal-mart
description_short: U.S. Bank branch and 24-hour ATM located inside a Walmart in West Milwaukee, Wisconsin, offering full banking services and cash access.
description_long:
U.S. Bank operates a full-service branch and ATM facility at 4140 W Greenfield Ave in West Milwaukee, Wisconsin, embedded within a Walmart location known as the Miller Park Way Walmart Branch. The branch combines traditional banking services with convenient retail location accessibility, making it a hybrid banking-retail presence.

The location offers comprehensive banking services including a 24-hour walk-up ATM that accepts deposits, a staffed lobby for in-person banking, and specialized services such as wealth management, mortgage origination, business banking, and loan services. The branch also provides customer support services including notary services, official checks, wire transfers, cash advances, debit card replacement, and currency exchange for account holders.

What distinguishes this location is its extended Walmart partnership model, offering retail convenience combined with full banking capabilities. The ATM operates 24/7 regardless of lobby hours, providing continuous cash access. The branch employs specialized advisors including wealth specialists and mortgage specialists, indicating a focus beyond basic transactional banking. The location also advertises promotional offerings such as bonus checking account incentives.

The branch operates with standard retail banking hours (Mon-Fri 10am-6pm, Sat 10am-2pm, closed Sundays) and maintains standard bank holiday closures. As a U.S. Bank location, customers have access to the broader U.S. Bank and U.S. Bancorp Investments networks. However, the branch is geographically limited to one location, and many specialized services require in-person visits during business hours rather than 24/7 availability.
pros: 24-hour walk-up ATM with deposit capability, accessible outside of branch lobby hours
Full-service branch with specialized advisors including wealth specialists and mortgage specialists
Convenient Walmart location with free parking
Comprehensive service offerings including wire transfers, notary services, official checks, and cash advances
Access to U.S. Bank's broader network of 70+ million ATMs and loan origination programs
Foreign currency exchange available for account holders
Promotional offers available (bonus checking account up to $450 advertised)
cons: Limited branch hours with lobby closed Sunday and only 2-hour Saturday service, limiting in-person accessibility
Single location limits convenience for customers not near West Milwaukee
Most specialized services (notary, official checks, medallion signature) require in-person visits and valid ID
Account requirements for some services (foreign currency exchange requires existing U.S. Bank account)
best_for: Walmart shoppers in West Milwaukee who need convenient ATM access and basic banking services
Existing U.S. Bank customers seeking in-person support for specialized services like notary or wire transfers
Customers interested in meeting with wealth or mortgage specialists in a retail-accessible location
diagnosis: This location is best for Walmart customers in the West Milwaukee area seeking 24/7 ATM access and those who want to conduct full banking services at a convenient retail location. The main caveat is that specialized services and account management require visits during limited branch hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturday), and this is a single location with no additional branches nearby, making it less suitable for customers who need frequent in-person service accessibility.
services: Mortgage services (new purchase, refinancing, loan officer consultation)
Cash advances (with valid ID and physical card)
Debit card replacement with temporary card access
Foreign currency exchange (buy online/pick up, or sell in-branch)
Business banking support (checking accounts and commercial loans)
